steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage's crucial clue is that gold was “much rarer than bronze”—this scarcity determines the logical consequence in the blank.

steps.title: Determine why the answer fits
steps.content: Not all hoards would contain a rare item; some lack gold entirely. Choice A states this directly: some hoards contained no gold, exemplified by Parc-y-Meirch. Choices B, C, and D introduce unrelated concepts: melting, manufacturing, and discovery. That matches choice A — A is correct.
